metadata.title: Job Hunter Team
metadata.description: A team of AI agents that find jobs for you. Open source, local, private.

layout.requiresJavaScript: Job Hunter Team requires JavaScript to run. Please enable it in your browser to continue.

hero.title: Your team of AI agents
hero.description: An open-source system of autonomous agents that search, analyze, and apply for jobs for you. Local, private, under your control.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't

multiAgentTeam.title: Multi-Agent Team
multiAgentTeam.description: 7 specialized agents working together: Captain, Scout, Analyst, Scorer, Writer, Critic, and Sentinel.

continuousScan.title: Continuous Scanning
continuousScan.description: Scout searches job offers 24/7 across all configured channels.

smartApplications.title: Smart Applications
smartApplications.description: Writer creates tailored CVs and cover letters for each position.

smartScoring.title: Smart Scoring
smartScoring.description: Scorer calculates match score based on your profile and requirements.

realTimeDashboard.title: Real-Time Dashboard
realTimeDashboard.description: Monitor all activities, statistics, and results from a single interface.

youInControl.title: You in Control
youInControl.description: Decide which applications to send. Nothing happens without your approval.

configure.title: Configure
configure.description: Set up your profile, skills, and preferences once.

agentsWork.title: Agents work
agentsWork.description: The team searches, analyzes, and prepares applications automatically.

youDecide.title: You decide
youDecide.description: Review proposals and approve applications with one click.

download.title: Download
download.description: Install the app on your machine.

cta.title: Ready to revolutionize your job search?
cta.subtitle: Start now — it's free
cta.footer: No credit card required · Public beta

about.title: A team of AI agents at your service

captain.name: Captain
captain.description: Coordinates the team and assigns operational priorities.

scout.name: Scout
scout.description: Searches for new opportunities on job channels.

analyst.name: Analyst
analyst.description: Reads requirements and evaluates fit with profile.

scorer.name: Scorer
scorer.description: Calculates priority and match score of offers.

writer.name: Writer
writer.description: Prepares CV and cover letter tailored for each position.

critic.name: Critic
critic.description: Reviews materials and flags what needs to be corrected.

sentinel.name: Sentinel
sentinel.description: Monitors budget, limits, and system health.

assistant.name: Assistant
assistant.description: Helps you configure the system and navigate the platform.

errors.resourceNotFound: The requested resource does not not exist or has been moved.
errors.unexpectedError: Unexpected error. Please try again or return to the dashboard.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again

captain.title: Captain
captain.description: Orchestrates the entire Job Hunter pipeline

status.startToBegin: Start Captain to begin the session.

captain.placeholder: Write a message to start the conversation.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.description: Helps you configure the system and navigate the platform
assistant.placeholder: Write a message to start the conversation.
assistant.fileIsSource: The file is the source of truth

sentinel.title: Sentinel
sentinel.description: Monitors and protects the Job Hunter pipeline

status.startToBegin: Start Sentinel to begin the session.

dashboard.setupProfile: Set up your profile to start the search.
dashboard.profileConfigured: The profile has been configured with your details.
dashboard.needHelp: Need help? The assistant can guide you...

profile.fillForm: Fill out the form below or upload a CV to extract data automatically.

ready.title: Ready
ready.description: Applications with documents ready and positions waiting for CV.

applications.approvedCV: Approved CVs (PASS) — status not updated in legacy. Ready to send.
